items.title: Web Development & Front End
items.description: From UI/UX design, design conversion and implementation, to deployment. Building high-performance web experiences for projects of any size, from simple boutique sites to complex web applications.

items.title: Modern Tech Selection
items.description: Planning, research, testing, and implementation. Evaluating and selecting modern front-end technologies and software tools tailored to your specific project needs.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Managing project lifecycles and timelines. Keeping deliverables organized and coordinating with cross-functional teams to ensure on-time delivery.

items.title: IT Consultancy
items.description: Strategic technical advisory backed by 25+ years of experience. Helping startups and businesses map out architectures, build prototypes, and avoid costly technical mistakes.

items.title: AI-Enhanced Workflows
items.description: Exploring and integrating AI-assisted tools to enhance development workflows, accelerate delivery, and improve code quality and maintainability.

items.title: Technical Communication
items.description: Documentation, guides, training manuals, and system specs. Translating complex technical concepts into clear, actionable documents.
